text.title: Generative UI Design Spec Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the spec artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.code: { "spec_id": "generative-ui-design-001", "version": "1.0.0", "scope": "Defines the methodology output for the canonical happy path.", "constraints": ["constraint-1", "constraint-2"], "acceptance_criteria": ["validator passes", "decision tree consumed"], "owner": "design@example.com", "validated_at": "2026-05-23T10:00:00Z" }

example.note: Missing required fields per the schema above.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Auto-populate timestamps from the validation moment.
Normalise enum casing to schema lowercase.
